CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO MICHAEL COLO BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF APR-29-2013 AT 1:30 PM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-29-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTAL, LEO ZACHARIAS, REYNA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILKIE, NATE EICHENHOFER, CAROLYN AKA ALEXANDRA FABBRI FABBRI, ALEXANDRA AKA CAROLYN EICHENHOFER $5,986.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,096.00, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST MICHAEL COLO IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE.
